h61c220a1g1708g4656g92a5gf8d34a9aee81: Lae'zel, you've the most exquisite eyes - golden as the sands of the Calim.
hc44bba1bg8e1ag4999ga1b7g08258f1a06fd: And you've a soft skull. A ghaik tentacle will have no issues pushing through it.
he1a256beg4e31g4205gad7cgd868d45671cb: No, it is a fact. Life in this Faerûn is laughably weak.
